response:
Alex reads books.
Books hold stories.
Stories show love.
Love changes views.
Views shift slowly.
Slowly time passes.
Passes days quickly.
Quickly pages turn.
Turns pages daily.
Daily reading helps.
Helps minds grow.
Grow new ideas.
Ideas break chains.
Chains hold past.
Past fades now.
Now comes change.
Change brings hope.
Hope fills hearts.
Hearts beat faster.
Faster thoughts arise.
Arise fresh dreams.
Dreams seek truth.
Truth opens doors.
Doors lead wide.
Wide paths stretch.
Stretch far ahead.
Ahead lies joy.
Joy warms souls.
Souls find peace.
Peace ends strife.
Strife gives calm.
Calm brings rest.
Rest fuels life.
Life holds more.
More means growth.
Growth needs time.
Time brings wisdom.
Wisdom guides steps.
Steps walk forward.
Forward leads on.
On comes day.
Day starts bright.
Bright sun shines.
Shines light far.
Far reaches out.
Out spreads news.
News tells tales.
Tales end soon.
Soon new starts.
Starts fresh read.
Reads next book.
Book holds many.
Many pages wait.
Wait for hands.
Hands turn sheets.
Sheets show words.
Words form lines.
Lines make pages.
Pages count high.
High numbers sum.
Sum equals total.
Total splits evenly.
Evenly shared days.
Days hold thirty.
Thirty pages daily.
Daily average found.
Found result clear.
Clear answer waits.
Waits for you.
You see truth.
Truth is thirty.
Thirty pages daily.
Daily means each.
Each day counts.
Counts sum total.
Total pages three.
Three novels read.
Read all done.
Done with math.
Math gives thirty.
Thirty is answer.
Answer ends here.
Here we stop.
Stop reading now.
Now think back.
Back to start.
Start was Alex.
Alex reads well.
Well done Alex.
Alex learns fast.
Fast minds grow.
Grow strong views.
Views change now.
Now love wins.
Wins over fear.
Fear fades out.
Out comes joy.
Joy fills
